creator: knezour@weboutsourcing.cz
text: Near the end of the mentioned chapter at https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/port-upgrading.html is sentence "Send the patch following the guidelines in Chapter 10, Upgrading a Port.", where text beggining Chapter 10... links to page self. Author probably meant to link to chapter 4. - Writing the Problem Report?
